title: senecio oclonetus
intro: Senecio oclonetus, also known as the woolly groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. The senecio oclonetus plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the potential to treat liver and kidney issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
